channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-23T16:07Z — 1109 outages, 22,675 customers, 804 fair-weather, 13 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NC-DEC: 1394 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NC-DEC: 1053 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NJ-PSEG: 782 cust (NEAR OPERATING DC FAIR-WEATH) | NC-DEC: 767 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
